name: Ghostrick or Treat
name_jp: ゴーストリック・オア・トリート
desc: If you control a "Ghostrick" Field Spell or a "Ghostrick" Link Monster: You can target 1 face-up monster your opponent controls; your opponent can pay 2000 LP to make this card's effect "Set this card instead of sending it to the GY after activation", otherwise, for the rest of this turn, that face-up monster cannot attack, its effects are negated, also it is changed to face-down Defense Position during the End Phase. You can only activate 1 "Ghostrick or Treat" per turn.
eff: If you control a "Ghostrick" Field Spell or a "Ghostrick" Link Monster: You can target 1 face-up monster your opponent controls; your opponent can pay 2000 LP to make this card's effect "Set this card instead of sending it to the GY after activation", otherwise, for the rest of this turn, that face-up monster cannot attack, its effects are negated, also it is changed to face-down Defense Position during the End Phase. You can only activate 1 "Ghostrick or Treat" per turn.

action: Sets face-up cards in your Spell & Trap Zone
mst: Negates the effects of your opponent's Effect Monsters
attack: Prevents your opponent's monsters from attacking
life_points: Your opponent pays Life Points for effect
misc: Requires control of specific Monster card type
